case_title: AAI SHREE LLC VS. ANGEL J. SANCHEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF HOWARD OLSEN IN SUPPORT OF CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AAI SHREE LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AAI SHREE LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, ANGEL J. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2032 MISSION STREET #37, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94110, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AAI SHREE LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, ANGEL J. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, ANGEL J.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF AAI SHREE LLC SERVED NOV-15-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, ANGEL J.
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $25.83 FILED BY PLAINTIFF AAI SHREE LLC

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, ANGEL G. (SUED AS ANGEL J. SANCHEZ) ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, ANGEL J.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AAI SHREE LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, ANGEL J.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, ANGEL J.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR STAY OF EXECUTION , MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, PROOF OF SERVICE` FILED BY DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, ANGEL G. (SUED AS ANGEL J. SANCHEZ)
